title: Senior Doctor - GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Doctor with drive and ambition, GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
